name: Roman Executioner
oracleText:
Deathtouch
When Roman Executioner enters the battlefield, target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
flavorText: "Father, forgive them; for they know not what they do." — Luke 23:34
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Richard de Montbaston and collaborators's "Saint Longinus" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain medieval manuscript image on Commons.
classics.creditText: Richard de Montbaston and collaborators, Saint Longinus
classics.sourceNotes: Longinus is the cleanest classical-religious stand-in for the Roman executioner role.
